full_text:
Liu Xun (Ziheng)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xun, styledZiheng. Fell out with Yuan Shao and killed. Liu Xun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Xun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
